rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5:Four detectors... [develops mechanism]; 7:The move is empirical [frames discipline not failure]

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body

rules_evaluated.evidence: 5, 7, 164, 223: frames measurement, empiricism, reusable judges as what the student becomes

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use
rules_evaluated.evidence: benchmark (context-earned in 'What you do'), detector (introduced in context), precision/recall (taught in Phase 2 description)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No narrating student's past or present state

rules_evaluated.evidence: All prompt blocks use deterministic paths and references to previous output; no [BRACKETS]

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block
rules_evaluated.evidence: All prompt blocks follow the canonical shape with ** Prompt ** label and (Claude Code) destination

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chained-prompt isolation — don't leak the downstream pipeline

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Runtime-fork prompt blocks: paired divs, shared chip

Mood is 'mechanical rescue' — watching the scoreboard name the winner measurably. Explicit in maintainer block; body delivers the mood through Phase 2's narrative arc

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode
rules_evaluated.evidence: Title is 'Hallucination benchmark' (naming the method, not 'hallucination detector' or 'catching fabrications'). Body leads with 'empirical method selection', 'measurement', 'benchmarking'

summary: MAINTAINER_CUT at line 228; 7 fence ranges; student-facing body (lines 1-227) is clean across all compendiums. No banned words, no value-prop leaks, no maintainer-vocabulary smuggling, no over-hedging. Punchy framing at lines 5 and 7 both have carve-outs developed immediately downstream. All prompt blocks are properly structured with action lead-ins, deterministic paths, runtime-fork pairs, and no placeholders. Register is consistent with Bootstrap trio (Godin × Sutherland × Siilasmaa). Strategic framing (benchmarking as the rescue beat, measurement as the discipline) aligns with curriculum content-strategy. Zero blocking issues.
